targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "DeviceBatteryLevel")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> yield(name: "value")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "HeartRate_Intraday")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: true)
  |> movingAverage(n: 6)
  |> yield(name: "HR")

from( bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "RestingHR")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> yield(name: "value")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Steps_Intraday")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> movingAverage(n: 6)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Total Steps")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "SPO2_Intraday")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "SPO2_Intraday")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Sleep Levels")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "level")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["isMainSleep"] == "True")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:"Night" }))

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Sleep Levels")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "level")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["isMainSleep"] == "True")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:"Levels" }))

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Sleep Summary")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "minutesDeep")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:"Deep" }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: median, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "median")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Sleep Summary")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "minutesLight")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:"Light" }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: median, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "median")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Sleep Summary")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "minutesREM")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:"REM" }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: median, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "median")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Sleep Summary")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "minutesAwake")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:"Awake" }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: median, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "median")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Sleep Summary")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "efficiency")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: median, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:"Efficiency" }))
  |> yield(name: "median")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Skin Temperature Variation")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: median, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:"Skin ° Variation"}))
  |> yield(name: "median")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Sleep Summary")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "minutesDeep")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:"Deep" }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: median, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "median")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Sleep Summary")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "minutesAwake")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:"Awake" }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: median, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "median")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Sleep Summary")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "minutesLight")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:"Light" }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: median, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "median")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Sleep Summary")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "minutesREM")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:"REM" }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: median, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "median")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Sleep Levels")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "level")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "RestingHR")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:"Resting HR"}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "HRV")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field: ( if r["_field"] == "dailyRmssd" then "Daily" else "Deep")}))
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "SPO2")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "avg")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:"SPO2"}))
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "BreathingRate")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:"Breathing Rate"}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Activity Records")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["ActivityName"] == "Walk")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "steps")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: median, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "median")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Activity Records")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "steps")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field: r.ActivityName}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "sum")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Activity Records")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "duration")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:r.ActivityName}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "sum")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "HR zones")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "Normal" or r["_field"] == "Peak" or r["_field"] == "Fat Burn" or r["_field"] == "Cardio")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:r["_field"]}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

panels.description: Represent the level of activity in the day

targets.query:
import "date"
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "Activity Minutes")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "minutesFairlyActive" or r._field == "minutesLightlyActive" or r._field == "minutesSedentary" or r._field == "minutesVeryActive")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: median, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      Sedentary: r.minutesSedentary,
      Light: r.minutesLightlyActive,
      Fairly: r.minutesFairlyActive,
      Very: r.minutesVeryActive
  }))
  |> yield(name: "orderedMedian")

panels.title: Activities Minutes

targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "distance")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: median, createEmpty: false)
    |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:"Distance"}))
  |> yield(name: "median")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "calories")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: median, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:"Calories"}))
  |> yield(name: "median")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "Activity Records")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "duration")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:r.ActivityName}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1h, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "sum")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "DeviceBatteryLevel")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "DeviceBatteryLevel")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> derivative(unit: 15m, nonNegative: false, columns: ["_value"], timeColumn: "_time")
  |> yield(name: "rateOfChange")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "Derived RecoveryScore")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "score" or r._field == "confidence")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.MetricClass == "Derived")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.confidence >= 0.75)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _field: "score", _value: r.score}))
  |> yield(name: "score")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "Derived TrainingLoad")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.MetricClass == "Derived")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "daily_load" or r._field == "acute_7d" or r._field == "chronic_28d")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "load")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "Derived TrainingLoad")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.MetricClass == "Derived")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "load_ratio")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "ratio")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "Derived CardioFitness")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "vo2_estimate")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.MetricClass == "Derived")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "vo2")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "Derived CorrelationSignals")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.MetricClass == "Derived")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rhr_delta" or r._field == "hrv_delta" or r._field == "sleep_minutes_delta" or r._field == "steps_delta")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "corr")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "Derived PipelineHealth")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.MetricClass == "Derived")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "record_count_last_run" or r._field == "minutes_since_success")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "pipeline")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "Derived CorrelationMatrix")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.MetricClass == "Derived")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "corr_rhr_vs_hrv_14d" or r._field == "corr_sleep_vs_recovery_14d" or r._field == "corr_steps_vs_recovery_14d" or r._field == "corr_load_vs_recovery_14d" or r._field == "corr_load_vs_recovery_lag1_14d" or r._field == "corr_load_vs_recovery_lag2_14d")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "corr_matrix")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "Derived ZScores")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.MetricClass == "Derived")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "z_rhr" or r._field == "z_hrv" or r._field == "z_sleep_minutes" or r._field == "z_steps" or r._field == "z_training_load" or r._field == "z_recovery_score")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "zscores")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "Derived TrendSignals")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.MetricClass == "Derived")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "slope_7d_rhr" or r._field == "slope_7d_hrv" or r._field == "slope_7d_sleep_minutes" or r._field == "slope_7d_recovery_score")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "trends_small")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "Derived TrendSignals")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.MetricClass == "Derived")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "slope_7d_steps" or r._field == "slope_7d_training_load")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "trends_large")

base = from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "Derived ReadinessFlags")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.MetricClass == "Derived")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "readiness_score" or r._field == "readiness_confidence" or r._field == "overreaching_flag" or r._field == "under_recovered_flag" or r._field == "load_ratio")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.readiness_confidence >= 0.75)

score = base |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _field: "readiness_score", _value: r.readiness_score}))
conf = base |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _field: "readiness_confidence", _value: r.readiness_confidence}))
over = base |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _field: "overreaching_flag", _value: r.overreaching_flag}))
under = base |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _field: "under_recovered_flag", _value: r.under_recovered_flag}))
ratio = base |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _field: "load_ratio", _value: r.load_ratio}))

union(tables: [score, conf, over, under, ratio])
  |> yield(name: "readiness")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "Derived RecoveryScore")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "missing_inputs_count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.MetricClass == "Derived")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "missing")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "CardioFitness")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "vo2_max")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.MetricClass == "Direct")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "vo2_max")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ECG")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "event_count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.MetricClass == "Direct")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "ecg_events")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "IRN")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "event_count")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.MetricClass == "Direct")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "irn_events")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "DeviceSyncHealth")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "minutes_since_last_sync" or r._field == "battery_level" or r._field == "sync_success")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.MetricClass == "Direct")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "sync_health")

from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "Derived CardioFitnessDelta")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "vo2_delta")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.MetricClass == "Derived")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1d, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "vo2_delta")

list.description: Determines the time zone for grouping by day
list.label: Time Zone
list.name: TimeZone
